name: vscode-gemini-proxy
description: Minimal VS Code chat command that calls Gemini via a custom proxy endpoint.

geminiProxy.baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Gemini proxy (Cloudflare Worker).

geminiProxy.useV1.description: Use /v1/ instead of /v1beta/ in the API path.

geminiProxy.maxContextChars.description: Maximum number of characters to attach from file/selection context.

geminiProxy.maxSearchResults.description: Maximum number of search matches to attach from project search.

geminiProxy.allowCommands.description: Allow running shell commands from the chat tool bridge.

geminiProxy.allowFileRead.description: Allow reading files and listing directories via the tool bridge.

geminiProxy.allowFileWrite.description: Allow writing files via the tool bridge.

geminiProxy.allowExternalPaths.description: Allow file access outside the current workspace root.

geminiProxy.commandMaxBuffer.description: Max command output buffer size in bytes.

geminiProxy.allowAutoToolCalls.description: Automatically execute TOOL_CALL blocks without confirmation.
